name: example-hps-memphis-pop
title: Memphis Pop
description: 80s Memphis pop deck — warm cream canvas tiled edge-to-edge with a pink/teal/yellow confetti-dot pattern, 2.5px black-outlined cards with 5–9px hard offset shadows, hot-pink #ff3d8b lead accent, Archivo Black display type. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill memphis-pop. Use for playful product launches, creative pitches, community talks, or any deck that wants loud 1980s Memphis-design energy.

description_i18n.en: 80s Memphis pop deck — warm cream canvas tiled edge-to-edge with a pink/teal/yellow confetti-dot pattern, 2.5px black-outlined cards with 5–9px hard offset shadows, hot-pink #ff3d8b lead accent, Archivo Black display type. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill memphis-pop. Use for playful product launches, creative pitches, community talks, or any deck that wants loud 1980s Memphis-design energy.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 80 年代孟菲斯波普幻灯片——暖奶油底满版平铺粉/青/黄 confetti 圆点 pattern，2.5px 黑描边卡片 + 5–9px 硬阴影，热粉 #ff3d8b 主 accent，Archivo Black 展示字体。单文件 HTML、键盘翻页、零依赖。基于 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 memphis-pop 主题。适合好玩的产品发布、创意提案、社区分享等想要 80 年代孟菲斯设计能量的演示。

query.en: Create a {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}}, {{slideCount}}, as a single-file HTML deck locked to the Memphis Pop theme (upstream lewislulu/html-ppt-skill `memphis-pop`). Start from the seed `example.html` and replace slide content only — never rewrite the design system, the token sheet, or the runtime script. Locked visual spec: warm cream canvas `--bg:#fef6e8` with the body's edge-to-edge tiled confetti-dot pattern (three offset radial-gradient layers of 3px dots in hot pink #ff3d8b, teal #37c2d7 and yellow #ffcc00 at 200/220/260px tile sizes — keep it on every slide, never paint a slide background over it); white cards with `2.5px solid #111` outlines, hard offset shadows `--shadow:5px 5px 0 #111` / `--shadow-lg:9px 9px 0 #111` and `--radius:10px`; hot pink `--accent:#ff3d8b` leads, teal `--accent-2:#37c2d7` and yellow `--accent-3:#ffcc00` support; tri-color gradient `--grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff3d8b,#ffcc00 50%,#37c2d7)` for display numerals and highlight words only; 'Archivo Black' for display headings, 'Space Grotesk'/'Noto Sans SC' for body, 'JetBrains Mono' for code. Reuse only the Memphis decor devices already in the seed: confetti-dot canvas, black-outlined geometric SVG shapes (triangle, squiggle zigzag, circle, plus, half-tone arc), tilted sticker pills, and thick black divider bars — no glassmorphism, no soft blur shadows, no colors or fonts outside this spec. Keep the seed's horizontal scroll-snap `section.slide` scaffold (one 100vw×100vh screen per slide, no internal scrolling), the fixed header/footer chrome with the N / total counter and progress bar, and the keyboard runtime (←/→/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End navigation, #/N hash deep links). Compose pages from the upstream 31-layout catalog (cover → toc → section dividers → content layouts → big-number / chart / quote pages → thanks); rebuild any charts in pure CSS or inline SVG (no chart libraries, no external images or scripts); write real content with no lorem ipsum; put 1–3 sentences of speaker notes in each slide's hidden `.notes` block.
query.zh-CN: 为 {{audience}} 制作一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}）：锁定孟菲斯波普主题的单文件 HTML 幻灯片。从种子 example.html 出发，只替换内容，绝不重写设计系统和运行时脚本。锁定规格：暖奶油底 #fef6e8 满版平铺粉/青/黄 confetti 圆点 pattern；白卡 2.5px 黑描边 + 5px/9px 硬阴影；热粉 #ff3d8b 主 accent，青 #37c2d7、黄 #ffcc00 辅助；Archivo Black 展示标题，Space Grotesk/Noto Sans SC 正文。版式从上游 31 版式目录选取，一屏一页不滚动，图表用纯 CSS/SVG 重建，真实内容不用 lorem ipsum，每页在隐藏 .notes 写演讲备注。其余细节遵循英文 query。

exampleOutputs.title: Memphis Pop · POPSODA Launch Demo Deck
